offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, overdue invoices cause cash flow gaps. We provide timely alerts instead of manual tracking of invoices in spreadsheets.
problem: Overdue invoices lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Indie Hackers discussions about invoice tracking
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Community forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try invoice tracking dashboard and manual entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common invoice details as templates
Allow CSV import for existing invoices
Reduce steps in user onboarding process
